name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_Item_Request
title: R5: Request or Referral for Service (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SupplyRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/VisionPrescription)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ServiceRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SupplyRequest,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/VisionPrescription)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Request or Referral for Service (new)
element.comment:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.request` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Request or Referral for Goods or Service to be rendered.
